properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the threat of darkness has come breaking in And the force of fear blows like a violent wind When confusion strikes and clouds of chaos hit I know That my heart cannot be held by circumstance For my eyes are locked on the God who sees the end So when this world around me cries out, "Who can stand? " I know

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: That I will not be moved For my feet are planted in You I will not be moved For my feet are planted in You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A firm foundation My Solid Rock You can't be shaken You won't be stopped You hold me fast You never leave You are the hope To which I cling A firm foundation My God, You are

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Even when the mountains bow to rising waves No, the seas of doubt will never make me sway Yes, I will rejoice within the current's rage Singing oh

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will not be moved For my feet are planted in You I will not be moved For my feet are planted in You I will not be moved For my feet are planted in You I will not be moved For my feet are planted in You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You're holding me, You're holding me steady If it floods, I'm gonna be ready I am sealed in You You're holding me, You're holding me steady In the break of every levee I am sealed in You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: A firm foundation My Solid Rock You can't be shaken You won't be stopped You hold me fast You never leave You are the hope To which I cling A firm foundation My God, You are A firm foundation My God, You are A firm foundation My God, You are'
